input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.2.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.2.4
            TITLE: power and voltage limits will be checked by the energy meter data

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.2.4: Power and Voltage limits will be checked by the Energy Meter data
EV.3.2.4 Power and Voltage limits will be checked by the Energy Meter data 
Energy is calculated as the time integrated value of the measured voltage multiplied by the 
measured current logged by the Energy Meter.

final_answer: Power and Voltage limits will be checked by the Energy Meter data. Energy is calculated as the time integrated value of the measured voltage multiplied by the measured current logged by the Energy Meter.
